_doctrine: Brain forward-prediction record. DIRECTION = did up/down/hold call match the 12h score move (2pt noise band). TRANSITION = when a rung CHANGE was predicted, did that exact rung get reached (harder, graded separately). Misses carry an autopsy naming which live signal misled. The SITE shows the 7-day rolling rate (what to trust now); full history is stored + all-time rates kept. Rides into the trading packets so Jordan reasons against the brains' actual forward track record.

open.reasoning: With zero 12h windows moving ±2+ points in 7 days, the coil demands a HOLD base rate until a specific breaker triggers.
open.confirmed_if: fear_greed stays 25-35, funding compresses to 0.005%, BTC holds above $62K for 72h
open.invalidated_if: VIX >22 + DXY >102.5 + BTC breaks $60K with volume

open.reasoning: With 0 of 42 windows showing ±2+ point moves, this is a textbook coil — HOLD is the statistically honest call until a breaker confirms either Panic leg down (fear_greed < 25, VIX > 75, funding < 30) or speculative recovery up (funding > 70, DXY < 50, stablecoin growth > 65).
open.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 with VIX spiking above 75 and funding collapsing below 30 — confirms Panic leg and potential Capitulation cascade toward true bottom
open.invalidated_if: BTC funding rises above 70 with DXY weakness breaking below 50 and stablecoin growth accelerating above 65 — signals speculative FOMO returning, invalidating bottom-comparison and shifting toward Complacency/Disbelief
